description: Firmware version × feature matrix. Answers version-specific questions: does X support Y on MCU Z? Breaking changes, upgrade paths, configurator version requirements.

betaflight.release_cadence: Every 6 months (June and December). New calendar-based versioning: YYYY.M.PATCH replaces 4.x series.
betaflight.configurator: Progressive Web App at app.betaflight.com — matches firmware version. BF 2025.12 requires Configurator 2025.12.

rpm_filter.notes: Requires bidirectional DSHOT + BLHeli_32 v32.7+ or AM32 v2.0+. F4: use DSHOT300, not DSHOT600.

dshot_bidir.notes: F4 reliable only at DSHOT300. F7/H7 support DSHOT600 bidirectional.

position_hold.notes: NEW in 2025.12. GPS-assisted position hold. Requires GPS fix and compass. Previously iNav-only feature.

altitude_hold.notes: NEW in 2025.12. Barometer-based altitude hold mode added.

auto_land.notes: NEW in 2025.12. Auto-disarm on landing impact detection.

gps_rescue.notes: Improved in 2025.12. Still requires compass for reliable direction.

msp_displayport.notes: Required for DJI O3/O4, Walksnail, HDZero OSD. Configure MSP on VTX UART at 115200 baud.

turtle_mode.notes: Improved in 2025.12. Assign FLIP OVER AFTER CRASH to AUX switch in Modes tab.

fixed_wing_s_term.notes: NEW in 2025.12. S-term for smoother fixed-wing flight.

vtx_smartaudio.notes: Wire VTX control to FC UART TX. One-wire.

vtx_irc_tramp.notes: Wire both TX and RX. Two-wire.

mav_link.notes: MAVLink telemetry available. Enable in Ports tab.

blackbox.notes: Flash or SD card. Use Betaflight Blackbox Explorer at blackbox.betaflight.com.

chirp_tuning.notes: NEW in 2025.12. Automated frequency-sweep PID tuning.

breaking_changes: Gyro alignment changed: board-specific non-user-serviceable gyro alignment removed in favor of user board alignment. After upgrade, verify board alignment in Configuration tab — if arrow on PCB faces forward, alignment should be 0.
Do NOT restore 4.5 configuration backup — incompatible settings. Reconfigure from scratch.
Configurator must match firmware version: use app.betaflight.com (PWA, auto-updates). Old 10.10.0 desktop app does NOT work with 2025.12.
GPS features (PosHold, AltHold) require initial setup — not plug-and-play. Compass calibration required.
versions.upgrade_path: Backup with CLI 'diff all' first. Flash 2025.12.2 with FULL CHIP ERASE. Reconfigure from scratch — do not restore old config.
known_issues: Position Hold and Altitude Hold are new — expect some roughness compared to iNav's mature implementation
F4 boards: some USB issues reported on certain chips after flash — use DFU recovery if needed

rpm_filter.notes: Mature implementation. Requires bidir DSHOT + BLHeli_32 v32.7+ or AM32 v2.0+.

position_hold.notes: Not available in 4.5. Use iNav for GPS nav modes.

gps_rescue.notes: GPS rescue available but more limited than 2025.12.

breaking_changes: 4.5 configurator (10.10.0) required — old 10.9.x won't connect to 4.5 firmware
RPM filter parameter naming changed from 4.4 — re-tune after upgrade
versions.upgrade_path: Backup CLI 'diff all'. Flash with full chip erase. Re-apply config manually.

rpm_filter.notes: Mature. First version with stable bidir DSHOT on H7.

breaking_changes: Many parameters renamed between 4.4 and 4.5/2025.12 — do not restore config across versions
versions.upgrade_path: Upgrade to 2025.12.2 directly. Full chip erase. Reconfigure from scratch.

F4.notes: No hardware floating-point pipeline for filters. Heavy filter configs risk CPU overload.

H7.notes: Best performance. Dual IMU boards (Orqa QuadCore H7) add redundancy.

G4.notes: Newer MCU family. Similar capability to H7 in most applications.

inav.configurator: Version must match firmware major version exactly. iNav 8.x requires iNav Configurator 8.x. iNav 9.x requires Configurator 9.x. Mismatched versions will NOT connect.

gps_dead_reckoning.notes: Returns home using IMU/baro/wind if GPS lost.

flexible_motor_servo_allocation.notes: NEW: flexible motor and servo output allocation. Check outputs before first battery power-up after upgrade.

dji_o4_native.notes: DJI_NATIVE OSD type added in 8.0.1, improved in 9.0.

programming_framework_wind.notes: Dynamic minimum ground speed adjustment based on wind.

ads_b.notes: ADSB receiver support for OSD warnings of nearby aircraft.

rth.notes: RTH requires compass. Dead reckoning fallback if GPS lost.

breaking_changes: FULL CHIP ERASE required when flashing 9.0 — settings cannot be migrated via restore
Use CLI 'diff all' in Configurator 8.x BEFORE flashing 9.0
Flexible motor/servo allocation may change default output mapping — remove props and verify before battery power-up
PID Profile renamed to Control Profile throughout
Load diff in two stages if using multiple profiles (see release notes)
Configurator 9.x required — will not connect to 8.x firmware
versions.upgrade_path: 1) CLI diff all in Configurator 8.x and save to file. 2) Flash 9.0 with FULL CHIP ERASE. 3) Load diff in Configurator 9.x CLI. 4) Review red-highlighted incompatible settings. 5) Remove props, verify motor/servo outputs.

dji_o4_native.notes: Added in 8.0.1. Select DJI_NATIVE as video system in Configurator.

dji_o3_walksnail.notes: Use AVATAR OSD type if not using 8.0.1.

setup_wizard.notes: Configures RX and GPS serial ports automatically on first flash.

assistnow_gps.notes: Dramatically reduces GPS cold-start time. Requires AssistNow token in Configurator.

breaking_changes: FULL CHIP ERASE required when upgrading to 8.0 from 7.x — settings not compatible
Configurator 8.x required — will not connect to 7.x firmware
Use Configurator 7 CLI diff all before upgrading — then load in Configurator 8
Use the diff migration tool at iNav configurator to handle parameter renames automatically
versions.upgrade_path: 1) CLI diff all in Configurator 7.x. 2) Flash 8.0.1 with FULL CHIP ERASE. 3) Load diff in Configurator 8.x CLI. 4) Check for red-highlighted incompatible settings.
Upgrade to 8.0.1. Full chip erase required. Use diff migration tool.

ardupilot.release_cadence: Major releases every 6-12 months. Point releases more frequent.
ardupilot.configurator: Mission Planner (Windows) or QGroundControl (cross-platform). Both work with any ArduPilot version.
ardupilot.orqa_support: Orqa FC 3030 H7 QuadCore support added in ArduCopter 4.6.3 (Nov 2025).

ekf3.notes: EKF3 is default and recommended. EKF2 still available. Dual EKF recommended for reliability.

dronecan.notes: DroneCAN (formerly UAVCAN) for GPS, ESC, sensors on CAN bus.

bidir_dshot.notes: Bidirectional DShot for RPM telemetry. Configure via SERVO_BLH_BDMASK parameter.

rpm_notch_filter.notes: INS_HNTCx_REF must be non-zero for ESC/RPM/FFT notch to work — arming check added in 4.6.

scripting_lua.notes: Lua scripting for custom flight behaviors.

dronecan_gps.notes: Here4 and other DroneCAN GPS modules supported.

orqa_quadcore_h7.notes: Orqa FC 3030 H7 QuadCore target added in 4.6.3.

breaking_changes: INS_HNTCx_REF must be non-zero for notch filters — new arming check enforces this
SERVO_BLH_RVMASK mapping for motor reversal requires trial and error — no direct parameter
NeoPixel LED strips broken in some 4.6.x versions on certain boards — check board-specific release notes
versions.upgrade_path: Mission Planner or QGC: Install firmware → select ArduCopter → select stable → select your board. Parameters auto-migrate but review MAVLink Inspector for any warnings.
known_issues: T-Motor DroneCAN ESCs show low ESC status rate and thus low RPM rate in 4.6.3
NeoPixel LED strips broken on some boards since 4.6.x

rpm_notch_filter.notes: INS_HNTCx_REF not enforced by arming check in 4.5 — easy to misconfigure.

orqa_quadcore_h7.notes: Orqa QuadCore H7 target added in 4.6.3 only.

parameter_quick_reference.MOT_THST_HOVER: Auto-calibrated after first hover — leave at default 0.35 initially
parameter_quick_reference.INS_HNTCx_REF: Must be non-zero (set to 1.0) for ESC/RPM/FFT notch filters to work

px4.configurator: QGroundControl (primary). Mission Planner limited support. QGC version should be recent — update if sensor calibration pages look wrong.

bidir_dshot.notes: NEW in v1.16, sponsored by ARK. Configure via DSHOT_CONFIG parameter.

ekf2.notes: Default estimator. SYS_MC_EST_GROUP parameter removed — dedicated estimator params now used.

ekf3.notes: PX4 uses EKF2 (their own implementation, different from ArduPilot EKF3).

dronecan.notes: DroneCAN fully supported. 120-ohm termination required at bus ends.

ros2_interface.notes: PX4 ROS 2 Interface Library for writing flight modes as ROS 2 nodes.

uxrce_dds.notes: uXRCE-DDS middleware for ROS 2 integration. Replaces FastRTPS.

throw_mode.notes: Throw the drone to launch — hands-free takeoff mode.

companion_computer.notes: MAVLink or uXRCE-DDS to companion. DTK APB uses internal bridge.

gazebo_harmonic.notes: Gazebo Harmonic LTS replaces Garden as default simulator.

log_encryption.notes: Public-key encrypted logs with embedded decryption key.

breaking_changes: SYS_MC_EST_GROUP removed — dedicated estimator selection parameters now used
COM_POS_FS_DELAY (position loss failsafe delay) removed — now fixed at 1 second
Ethernet static IP changed from 192.168.0.3 to 10.41.10.2
SF45 lidar no longer auto-starts on TELEM2 — must configure explicitly
Gazebo Garden deprecated — use Gazebo Harmonic for simulation
versions.upgrade_path: QGC: Vehicle Setup → Firmware → PX4 Pro Stable Release. Full parameter reset recommended after major version upgrade.

parameter_quick_reference.FW_USE_AIRSPD: 0=don't use airspeed in controller even if present
parameter_quick_reference.DSHOT_CONFIG: Set to bidirectional DShot value for RPM telemetry (v1.16+)
parameter_quick_reference.MAV_SYS_ID: System ID for MAVLink — must be unique per vehicle on shared network
parameter_quick_reference.SER_TEL1_BAUD: 57600 default for SiK radios on TELEM1

versions.notes: Still widely used. Bidir DShot not available — use standard DShot without RPM telemetry.

configurator_version_requirements.note: Using the wrong configurator version is one of the most common setup errors.
configurator_version_requirements.betaflight: app.betaflight.com (PWA) auto-updates. Firmware 2025.12.x requires Configurator 2025.12. Old desktop app 10.10.0 does NOT work with 2025.12.
configurator_version_requirements.inav: iNav Configurator version MUST match firmware major version. iNav 8.x = Configurator 8.x only. iNav 9.x = Configurator 9.x only. Mismatch = will not connect.
configurator_version_requirements.ardupilot: Mission Planner or QGroundControl. Both are firmware-version agnostic — any recent version works with any ArduPilot firmware.
configurator_version_requirements.px4: QGroundControl is primary. Keep QGC updated — older versions may have broken sensor calibration UI for newer PX4 versions.

common_version_questions.a: Yes, from 2025.12 (4.6) onward. Not available in 4.5 or earlier. Requires GPS + compass.
Yes. Requires bidirectional DSHOT enabled + BLHeli_32 v32.7+ or AM32 v2.0+. F4: use DSHOT300.

common_version_questions.q: Can I use BLHeli_S with RPM filter in any Betaflight version?
common_version_questions.a: No. BLHeli_S has no ESC telemetry in any version. RPM filter requires BLHeli_32 or AM32.
Yes, from iNav 8.0.1. Select DJI_NATIVE as video system in Configurator 8.0.1+.

common_version_questions.q: Does ArduPilot support Orqa QuadCore H7?
Does PX4 v1.15 support bidirectional DShot?
common_version_questions.a: No. Bidirectional DShot was added in PX4 v1.16.

common_version_questions.q: What configurator do I need for iNav 9?
common_version_questions.a: iNav Configurator 9.x exactly. iNav 9.x firmware will NOT connect to Configurator 8.x or earlier.

common_version_questions.q: Can I restore my Betaflight 4.5 config backup on 2025.12?
common_version_questions.a: No. 2025.12 has incompatible parameter changes. Reconfigure from scratch after flashing.
